questions.question: The value of the integral from 0 to 1 of x^7 * (1-x)^12 dx is given by the Beta function B(m,n). Find m+n.
questions.solution: Integral is B(a+1, b+1). So m = a+1, n = b+1. m+n = a+b+2.

questions.question: Evaluate the integral from 0 to pi/2 of (sin^5 x) / (sin^5 x + cos^5 x) dx.
questions.hint: Use the property: Int(0 to a) f(x) dx = Int(0 to a) f(a-x) dx
questions.solution: Let I = Integral. Both numerator become sin^a and cos^a. 2I = Int(1) dx from 0 to pi/2 = pi/2 -> I = pi/4.
